jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at FIITJEE
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Instructional Designer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
